# Handle Types
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Sql/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource [ExposeProperties]
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Sql/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource [ExposeProperties]

# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Sql/addAzureSqlServer(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Sql/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlServerResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Sql/addDatabase(name: string, databaseName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Sql/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureSqlDatabaseResource
